assumptions: Token has an expiry timestamp
Current time is known
examples: Token expires at 10:00:00, current time is 10:00:00 => token_valid_at_expiry(token) is true
Token expires at 10:00:00, current time is 10:00:01 => token_valid_at_expiry(token) is false
invariants: Token remains valid until the expiry timestamp inclusive
samples.lean: def token_valid_at_expiry (token : Token) : Prop := token.expiry ≤ current_time
notes: The token is considered valid at the exact moment of expiry
Inclusive boundary semantics are used for token expiry validation
postconditions: Token is considered valid exactly at the expiry timestamp

tasks.task_description: Validate whether a token is valid exactly at the expiry timestamp.
